import { useState, useEffect } from 'react' import { NavLink } from 'react-router-dom' import { LayoutDashboard, Package, Users, ShoppingCart, Sun, Moon, Box } from 'lucide-react' const navItems = [ { to: '/', label: 'Dashboard', icon: LayoutDashboard }, { to: '/products', label: 'Products', icon: Package }, { to: '/customers', label: 'Customers', icon: Users }, { to: '/orders', label: 'Orders', icon: ShoppingCart }, ] export default function Sidebar() { const [isLight, setIsLight] = useState(false) useEffect(() => { document.body.classList.toggle('light-mode', isLight) }, [isLight]) return (

Inventory

Order Management System

Menu

{navItems.map(({ to, label, icon: Icon }) => ( `nav-item${isActive ? ' active' : ''}`} > {label} ))}
RS

Ridhi Sambhor

Store Manager

All systems operational
) }
